subject: Introductory onboarding call
description: Discussed required KYC documents and onboarding timeline.
outcome: Client to submit documents by end of week.

subject: Review submitted incorporation documents
description: Verified certificate of incorporation and director register.
outcome: Documents accepted, KYC review in progress.

subject: Kickoff meeting with wealth management team
description: Reviewed account structure and reporting requirements.

subject: KYC checks completed
description: All required due diligence checks passed with low risk rating.

subject: Onboarding completion call
description: Confirmed account is ready to trade and reviewed next steps.
outcome: Client confirmed readiness to begin trading.
